subject: [RFC PATCH v4 15/27] mm/mprotect: NP_OPS_PROTECT_WRITE - gate PTE/PMD write-upgrades

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: No summary available as this is the original patch author's root message.

2026-02-22.patch_summary: This patch series introduces a new node private operation (NP_OPS) called NP_OPS_PROTECT_WRITE, which allows services to intercept write faults and handle them with custom logic. The patch adds a new function folio_managed_wrprotect() and modifies various functions in the mm/ directory to suppress PTE write-upgrades when a folio is write-protected.
